0x80070005.description: The device could not be enrolled due to an access denied error. This typically indicates a licensing issue.
0x80070005.resolution: Verify the user has an active Intune license assigned. Check that MDM enrollment is not blocked by a Conditional Access policy.

0x80180014.description: The device has reached the allowed number of enrollments for this user account.
0x80180014.resolution: Remove one of the existing enrolled devices from Intune before enrolling a new one. Check the device enrollment limit in the Intune admin center.
